mapper.sql:
SELECT ioen.fid, ioen.fbillno, ioen.f_cplb, ioen.f_jqfx, bm.name as f_wldm, ioen.f_hsdj, ioen.f_ywpm, ioen.f_cty_baseproperty2, ioen.f_cbhj, ioen.f_cty_baseproperty3, ioen.f_xsddgls, ioen.f_xsddxtzt, ioen.f_cty_baseproperty5, ioen.f_khbzyq, ioen.f_xdl, ioen.f_hscgj, ioen.f_cgxpms, ioen.f_cgbzfs, ioen.f_qdl, ioen.f_jshj, ioen.f_cptp1, ioen.f_tp, ioen.f_cgtp1, ioen.f_cgtp2, ioen.f_jgsxrq, ioen.f_yjjq, ioen.f_zxs, ioen.f_mz, ioen.f_jz, ioen.f_c, ioen.f_k, ioen.f_g, ioen.f_glsl, ioen.f_gctp, ioen.fgcywms, ioen.fgccshys, ioen.fbzcc, ioen.fkhhh, ioen.fzjxdhsj, ioen.fzjxdsl, ioen.fmrcghsj, ioen.fxsj, se.name as fgys, ioen.ftpr, ioen.f_tp3, sue.user_name as fbjr, ioen.fcpys, ioen.f_ywms FROM inquiry_order_entry ioen
LEFT JOIN by_material bm on ioen.f_wldm=bm.k3_id LEFT JOIN supplier se on ioen.fgys=se.supplierid LEFT JOIN sys_user sue on ioen.fbjr=sue.k3_key
mapper.insert:
insert into inquiry_order_entry ( fid, fbillno, f_cplb, f_jqfx, f_wldm, f_hsdj, f_ywpm, f_cty_baseproperty2, f_cbhj, f_cty_baseproperty3, f_xsddgls, f_xsddxtzt, f_cty_baseproperty5, f_khbzyq, f_xdl, f_hscgj, f_cgxpms, f_cgbzfs, f_qdl, f_jshj, f_cptp1, f_tp, f_cgtp1, f_cgtp2, f_jgsxrq, f_yjjq, f_zxs, f_mz, f_jz, f_c, f_k, f_g, f_glsl, f_gctp, fgcywms, fgccshys, fbzcc, fkhhh, fzjxdhsj, fzjxdsl, fmrcghsj, fxsj, fgys, ftpr, f_tp3, fbjr, fcpys, f_ywms ) values
( #{item.fid}, #{item.fbillno}, #{item.fCplb}, #{item.fJqfx}, #{item.fWldm}, #{item.fHsdj}, #{item.fYwpm}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty2}, #{item.fCbhj}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty3}, #{item.fXsddgls}, #{item.fXsddxtzt}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty5}, #{item.fKhbzyq}, #{item.fXdl}, #{item.fHscgj}, #{item.fCgxpms}, #{item.fCgbzfs}, #{item.fQdl}, #{item.fJshj}, #{item.fCptp1}, #{item.fTp}, #{item.fCgtp1}, #{item.fCgtp2}, #{item.fJgsxrq}, #{item.fYjjq}, #{item.fZxs}, #{item.fMz}, #{item.fJz}, #{item.fC}, #{item.fK}, #{item.fG}, #{item.fGlsl}, #{item.fGctp}, #{item.fgcywms}, #{item.fgccshys}, #{item.fbzcc}, #{item.fkhhh}, #{item.fzjxdhsj}, #{item.fzjxdsl}, #{item.fmrcghsj}, #{item.fxsj}, #{item.fgys}, #{item.ftpr}, #{item.fTp3}, #{item.fbjr}, #{item.fcpys}, #{item.fYwms} )

insert into inquiry_order_entry ( fid, fbillno, f_cplb, f_jqfx, f_wldm, f_hsdj, f_ywpm, f_cty_baseproperty2, f_cbhj, f_cty_baseproperty3, f_xsddgls, f_xsddxtzt, f_cty_baseproperty5, f_khbzyq, f_xdl, f_hscgj, f_cgxpms, f_cgbzfs, f_qdl, f_jshj, f_cptp1, f_tp, f_cgtp1, f_cgtp2, f_jgsxrq, f_yjjq, f_zxs, f_mz, f_jz, f_c, f_k, f_g, f_glsl, f_gctp, fgcywms, fgccshys, fbzcc, fkhhh, fzjxdhsj, fzjxdsl, fmrcghsj, fxsj, fgys, ftpr, f_tp3, fbjr, fcpys, f_ywms ) values ( #{fid}, #{fbillno}, #{fCplb}, #{fJqfx}, #{fWldm}, #{fHsdj}, #{fYwpm}, #{fCtyBaseproperty2}, #{fCbhj}, #{fCtyBaseproperty3}, #{fXsddgls}, #{fXsddxtzt}, #{fCtyBaseproperty5}, #{fKhbzyq}, #{fXdl}, #{fHscgj}, #{fCgxpms}, #{fCgbzfs}, #{fQdl}, #{fJshj}, #{fCptp1}, #{fTp}, #{fCgtp1}, #{fCgtp2}, #{fJgsxrq}, #{fYjjq}, #{fZxs}, #{fMz}, #{fJz}, #{fC}, #{fK}, #{fG}, #{fGlsl}, #{fGctp}, #{fgcywms}, #{fgccshys}, #{fbzcc}, #{fkhhh}, #{fzjxdhsj}, #{fzjxdsl}, #{fmrcghsj}, #{fxsj}, #{fgys}, #{ftpr}, #{fTp3}, #{fbjr}, #{fcpys}, #{fYwms} )
